description.value:
Your life in the water has taught you to adapt to its incredible properties for conducting sound. Starting at 3rd level Genjutsu you cast with the Audible Keyword may deal cold damage instead of its normal damage type. If near a sufficient body of water, you can reduce the Cost, or increase the Damage die by an amount equal to its rank (D=1, C =2, B =3, A=4, S=5, Min Half Original Cost. Apply this effect each time you pay concentration cost)

Starting at 7th Level, You may select a number of Jutsu equal to your proficiency bonus in your Jutsu lust, with the Water Release Keyword. Those Jutsu loose the Ninjutsu* Keyword, and Gain the Genjutsu and Audible Keyword. You may change these Jutsu after a Long rest. These Jutsu do not gain the benefits of having the Audible Keyword for interacting with this Feature other effects. Additionally, You can replace any conditions inflicted by Genjutsu you cast with an equal amount of the Chilled conditions.

Starting at 15th level, Creatures with the Chilled Condition receive a -1 to saving throws caused by your Audible Gensjutsu, for each rank of Chilled they have. Additionally, whenever they Critically Fail a Saving throw from an Audible GenJutsu they cast, they immediately take damage from their Chilled Condition.
